tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose control or prediabetes. Total cholesterol and HDL are below normal, which may be associated with increased cardiovascular risk, especially given the low HDL. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and triglycerides, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of cardiovascular risk assessment and glycemic management.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

line.value: Calle de los Donantes de Sangre 3
